PARAM.description: string to check for being a regular expression

PARAM.description: string to check for being a regular expression, not null
PARAM.name: s
PARAM.content: string to check for being a regular expression

PARAM.description: number of groups expected, not less than 1
PARAM.name: groups

RETURN.description: Returns null if the argument is a syntactically valid regular expression with at least the given number of groups. Otherwise returns a PatternSyntaxException describing why the argument is not a regex.
RETURN.assertion: assert args[1] > 0 && !isRegex(args[0], args[1]) ? null : regexException(args[0], args[1]);
RETURN.content: Returns null if the argument is a syntactically valid regular expression with at least the given number of groups. Otherwise returns a PatternSyntaxException describing why the argument is not a regex.
